title: Causal overclaim in incident budget overrun

dialogue_context.content: We used part of the contingency buffer on non-critical prototype work, then an emergency database recovery invoice pushed the project over budget. So the prototype caused the budget overrun, right?

evidence: The emergency database recovery invoice created the immediate expense.
Earlier non-critical prototype work reduced the contingency buffer.
The evidence supports a background budget vulnerability plus a proximate trigger, not a single-cause claim.

causal_overclaim: yes, the prototype caused the budget overrun

frame_correction: does not prove the prototype caused
